phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a walking tour
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo reservo una visita guiada a pie?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs KÓ-moh reh-SEHR-boh OO-nah bee-SEE-tah g-ee-AH-dah AH PEE-eh

likely_response.local: En recepción, aquí en la oficina.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN ah-k-Í EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah
likely_response.translation_en: At reception, right here in the office.

responses.english: At reception, right here in the office.
responses.phonetic: EHN reh-thehp-thee-ÓN ah-k-Í EHN LAH oh-fee-THEE-nah
responses.local: En recepción, aquí en la oficina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the information desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de información?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-de es-TAH el mos-trah-DOR de in-for-mah-SYON?

likely_response.local: Justo al fondo, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOO-stoh AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Right at the back, on the right.

responses.english: Right at the back, on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOO-stoh AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Justo al fondo, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up city maps
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger un mapa de la ciudad?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-koh-EHR oon MAH-pah deh lah thyoo-DAHD?

likely_response.local: Aquí mismo, en el mostrador principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: ah-k-Í MEE-smoh EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Right here, at the main counter.

responses.english: Right here, at the main counter.
responses.phonetic: ah-k-Í MEE-smoh EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL
responses.local: Aquí mismo, en el mostrador principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if accessibility guides are available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen guías de accesibilidad disponibles?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, TYEH-nen GEE-as de ak-se-si-bee-lee-DAHD di-po-NEE-bles?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are brochures on the table.

responses.english: Yes, there are brochures on the table.
